How many calorie is the normal serving of the burger?

Is the food here is good?

We’re excited to introduce our Spinach Tomato Linguine — a light yet satisfying pasta made for plant-based lovers and health-conscious diners.

🍝 What’s in it?
Fresh spinach, cherry tomatoes, garlic, and olive oil tossed with perfectly cooked linguine. Simple, fresh, and full of flavor.

🔥 Nutrition:
• 390 kcal per plate
• Vegan & Vegetarian-friendly
• Dairy-Free, Nut-Free, and Egg-Free

Perfect for a wholesome lunch or a guilt-free dinner. Come by and give it a try — your taste buds (and body) will thank you! 💚
